creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
A previous update (5.15.0 -> 5.19.1) in ports r525454 contained security fixes but didn't appear to be marked and/or merged as such.

From the 5.20.0 changelog entries: "Mattermost v5.20.0 contains a low level security fix"

From the 5.21.0 changelog entries: Mattermost v5.21.0 contains low level security fixes

Pending VuXML entries and 5.21.0 version update

For future version updates, please report whether or not they include security issues, so they can be triaged and merged appropriately.

Thanks!
